description: Lock lighthouse_networks to a Pharos-anchored ancient lighthouse lineage and remove pilotage and glass optics as direct prerequisites.

checks.reason: The lineage remains anchored to the Pharos of Alexandria around 280 BCE, while later Greco-Roman lighthouses expand the system evidence.
A lighthouse lineage/system is made from harbor lighthouse towers and beacon fires.
Pilotage is a navigation practice served by lighthouse marks, not a construction or operating prerequisite for the lighthouse infrastructure.
The ancient Pharos-style lighthouse scope is based on elevated beacon fires, not later glass lens optics.
